This report scans workspace policy, workspace specs, and workflow checkout metadata for prompt-boundary, credential, private memory, external mount, destructive mutation, long-running service, raw body leakage, checkout, setup, approval, and unbounded-inventory risks. It reports metadata, paths, risk codes, severities, and hashes only; workspace bodies, file bodies, workflow bodies, issue bodies, comments, prompts, tool outputs, credentials, and secret values are not included.
